description: Architecting modern web solutions, optimizing cloud deployments using AWS & Docker, and leading a team of developers to build high-performance dashboard consoles.
Designed and integrated scalable payment checkout systems using Stripe, built robust Node.js backend services, and migrated legacy code to modular Next.js applications.
Crafted responsive, pixel-perfect user interfaces, optimized rendering paths for real-time WebSocket web applications, and collaborated closely with UI/UX design teams.
